chat.empty: Start a conversation with your research assistant.

connectionBanner.disconnected: Disconnected — unsent messages may be lost. Check if the gateway is running

chat.notConnected: Not connected — check if the gateway is running
chat.sendFailed: Send failed — the connection may have dropped. Try resending
chat.imageNotSupported: Current model does not support image input. Please enable a separate vision model in Settings, or switch to a model that supports images (e.g. Claude, GPT-4o).

slashCmd.clearFailed: Could not reset transcript on gateway; only cleared this view until reload

library.title: Literature Library
library.selectCollection: Browse by collection (all papers in set)
library.noCollectionsYet: No collections yet. Create one with the agent (e.g. library_manage_collection).
library.empty: Let your Research-Claw explore a new direction and find papers for you.
library.emptyFiltered: No papers match the current filters.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.empty:
No tasks yet.
Ask the agent to help you plan your research.

askAgent.agentPrompt: Report on the current progress and completion status of task "{{title}}". Include: completed work, obstacles encountered, estimated remaining effort, and next-step recommendations.
askAgent.humanPrompt: Based on the current progress and available information, please provide completion suggestions for task "{{title}}". Include: recommended next steps, resources that may be needed, and guidance on how to complete this task efficiently.
askAgent.mixedPrompt: Report on the current status of task "{{title}}". How is the part I am responsible for progressing? What is the completion status of the part you are handling? What should each of us do next?

gantt.title: Gantt View
gantt.noTasks: No tasks with deadlines to display.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.uploadFailedMulti: {{count}} file(s) failed to upload — check file permissions
workspace.empty:
Workspace is empty.
Files will appear here as you and the agent create them.
workspace.dragDrop: Drop files here to add to workspace

contextMenu.openFailed: Failed to open — the file may have been moved or deleted
contextMenu.deleteFailed: Delete failed — the file may be in use or permission denied

workspace.uploadFailed: Upload failed — check file permissions and available disk space
workspace.moveFailed: Move failed — the target folder may not exist or has a name conflict
workspace.renameFailed: Rename failed — check for name conflicts or invalid characters
workspace.createFailed: Creation failed — check folder permissions or name conflicts

preview.title: File Preview
preview.errorTooLarge: File is too large to preview — try opening it with an external editor
preview.errorNotFound: File not found — it may have been moved or deleted by the agent
preview.errorGeneric: Failed to load file — try refreshing or opening externally
preview.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
preview.deleteFailed: Delete failed — the file may be in use or permission denied

monitor.title: Monitors
monitor.disconnected: Connect to gateway to view monitors
monitor.emptyHint: Ask your Research-Claw to set up monitoring for arXiv papers, GitHub repos, RSS feeds, and more.
monitor.addPrompt: I want to set up a new monitor. Help me configure it. Available source types: arXiv, GitHub, RSS, Webpage, OpenAlex, Twitter, Custom.
monitor.askAgentPrompt: Please check and report on the monitor "{{name}}" ({{source}}). Run the scan now and summarize findings.
monitor.deleteConfirmContent: Delete "{{name}}"? It will stop running and all cached results will be lost.

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeyWillKeep: Leave empty to keep the current API key
settings.apiKeyWillUpdate: Saving will replace the current API key
settings.apiKeyDeletePending: Saving will clear this provider's API key
settings.apiKeyMissing: No API key configured for this provider
settings.visionModelHint: When enabled, text and images will be processed by different models
settings.showSystemFilesHint: Show agent prompt files (.ResearchClaw/) and system directories in the workspace file tree
settings.restartHint: Changes are saved to openclaw.json. The gateway will restart automatically. Proxy changes require a full restart (openclaw gateway --force).
settings.saveFailed: Save failed — the gateway may have restarted. Try again
settings.copyFailed: Copy failed — your browser may not support clipboard access
settings.validationMissing: Please enter API URL and model name
settings.restartConfirmContent: Saving will close the gateway and restart it. If the restart fails, please restart manually.
settings.webSearchHint: Requires a search provider API key
settings.webSearchPriorityHint: Web search is L3 priority — the agent prefers academic API tools (arXiv, OpenAlex, etc.) first.
settings.heartbeatHint: Periodic background checks (deadlines, reading reminders). Uses lightweight context to minimize token cost.
settings.restartConfirmDesc: All active conversations will be interrupted. The gateway will recover automatically in a few seconds.

setup.title: Welcome to Research-Claw
setup.subtitle: Configure your AI research assistant to get started
setup.apiKeyExisting: Existing key preserved — enter new to replace
setup.openaiCodexOauthHint: To use OpenAI OAuth (Codex/ChatGPT), run: openclaw models auth login --provider openai-codex. Then select provider openai-codex and save.
setup.visionModelHint: When enabled, text and images will be processed by different models
setup.proxyHint: If your network requires a proxy to reach AI APIs, enter it here. Takes effect after gateway restart.
setup.restartHint: After saving, the gateway will restart automatically. The dashboard reconnects on its own.
setup.configureFailed: Configuration failed — check the API URL and key, then try again

boot.gatewayHint: Make sure the OpenClaw gateway is running: openclaw gateway --force
boot.needsTokenHint: Enter the gateway token to connect. Find it in Docker logs or your .env file.

oauth.step1Desc: Click the button to open the authentication page. Log in and authorize access.
oauth.step2Desc: After authentication, your browser will redirect to a URL starting with http://localhost:1455/... — copy the full URL from your browser's address bar and paste it below.
oauth.success: Authentication successful! Token has been saved. You can now save your settings.

cron.deleteSessionConfirm: Remove this scheduled task? The gateway cron job will be stopped (when matched) and the chat session will be deleted.

project.deleteConfirm: Delete this project? Chat history will be lost.

error.title: Something went wrong — click Retry or refresh the page

docker.description: Research-Claw is running inside a Docker container. Files cannot be opened with host applications directly.
docker.copyFailed: Copy failed — your browser may not support clipboard access
docker.downloadFailed: Download failed — check your network connection to the gateway
docker.bindMountHint: Tip: change your docker-compose.yml to a bind mount so you can browse workspace files from the host:

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.disconnected: Connect to gateway to view extensions

ppt.hint: Use rc.ppt.* methods to initialize and export PPT Master projects.
ppt.sourceFileSelect: Select source file from workspace outputs
ppt.outputHint: After generation, open the newest PPTX under workspace/outputs/ppt/.
ppt.openDockerFallback: Cannot open directly in Docker. Use the container path shown in the result.

skills.title: Skills
skills.updateFailed: Skill update failed — the gateway may be restarting. Try again shortly
skills.openFailed: Failed to open — the file may have been moved or deleted

channels.title: Channels
channels.emptyHint: Ask the agent to help you configure a messaging channel.
channels.toggleFailed: Channel toggle failed — the gateway may be restarting. Try again shortly
channels.deleteConfirmContent: Delete {{channel}}? The channel configuration will be removed.
channels.deleteFailed: Channel delete failed — the gateway may be restarting. Try again shortly
channels.qrLoginFailed: QR login failed — the code may have expired. Tap Retry to scan again

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.toggleFailed: Plugin toggle failed — the gateway may be restarting. Try again shortly
